item.title: Did you know: Cats show love in subtle ways like slow blinking. When a cat blinks slowly at you, it’s actually a sign of trust and comfort, sometimes called a cat kiss! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #catlove
item.description: By @1anirank1: Did you know: Cats show love in subtle ways like slow blinking. When a cat blinks slowly at you, it’s actually a sign of trust and comfort, sometimes called a cat kiss! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #catlove
